title: Daniel Flores Orozco
text:
I am a researcher and data analyst at the THRiVE Discovery Lab at the University of Manitoba, with a background in engineering and a strong interest in how data can be used to better understand the world around us. Outside of research, I spend time on the soccer field as both a player and a referee.
I am particularly passionate about working with reliable data and turning it into meaningful insights. I also enjoy building interactive dashboards and tools that make complex information easier to explore, interpret, and communicate..
